Identity.Tooltip: +2 Pierce and +1.5 Crush/Hack resistance but -3% walk speed
Identity.History: Han Elite; Caetra Medium; German Melee Shield; Sparabara (Persian large wicker); Celtic Melee (large Celtic oval); Clipeus (Roman/Italic round); Carthaginian medium; Kushite medium bossed; Boeotian variant; British large oval
